# YORUKAI.TV

> Cinematic anime, movies, live TV, and manga streaming. Stream beyond on YORUKAI.TV.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Featured and trending anime, movies and series.
- [Browse](/browse): Browse the full catalog by genre, year and type.
- [Genres](/genres): Explore titles by genre.
- [Manga](/manga): Read trending, popular and latest manga.
- [Live TV](/live-tv): Live channels and EPG.
- [Search](/search): Search across the catalog.
